name: Autoresearch Task
description: Implement BM25 or TF-IDF based re-ranking as a second-pass scoring step on top of the current retrieval results. After initial candidate retrieval, apply BM25 scoring between the query terms and document content to reorder results before returning them. This addresses the gap between semantic/vector retrieval and lexical relevance that often causes low precision and NDCG scores.
